instruction: There's a stray arrow mark on the ellipsis horizontal icon. Remove it.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/ellipsis-horizontal.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6.75 12a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0ZM12.75 12a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0ZM18.75 12a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,100 112,112 108,104 112,112 104,108" />
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,100 112,112 108,104 112,112 104,108" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/ellipsis-horizontal.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6.75 12a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0ZM12.75 12a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0ZM18.75 12a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
